programme.title: Let's Go Home S3 - EP 1
programme.desc: Let’s Go Home 3 makes a return, bringing a cross-border journey filled with new emotions and surprises! Led by host Bowie Tsang, the show brings together a lineup of cross-industry celebrity guests — including Hsieh Ying-Hsuan, Annie Chen, Ethan Ruan, Tanya Chua and more — as they embark on a heartfelt journey home, rediscovering their most genuine connections with their hometowns, families, and themselves.

programme.title: Hotel Barcelona (1)
programme.desc: Laura Santos returns with her troubled son Pedro to her parents’ grand hotel in Barcelona, hoping to guide him back on track. But her homecoming rekindles old family conflicts, as buried tensions resurface within the walls of Hotel Barcelona.

programme.title: The Beautiful Spark
programme.desc: After losing his job in a scandal, Michelin-starred chef Philippe gets a second chance at La Belle Étincelle - a unique restaurant run by Virginie, and staffed by her autistic son Noé alongside other young people with disabilities.

programme.title: Deserted
programme.desc: While on assignment to the Sinai coast, Swedish photojournalist Ingrid is kidnapped by a group of Palestinian men and hidden in the desert. An unlikely love affair arises between Ingrid and one of her captors, Ali.

programme.title: The Kiss
programme.desc: In 1913 Denmark, young officer Anton grapples with duty and love when he befriends Baron von Løvenskjold's daughter, Edith, confined to a wheelchair. As their bond deepens, Anton is ensnared in a web of promises and lies, torn between pity and true love.

programme.title: Love At First Fight
programme.desc: Between his friends and the family business, Arnaud's summer looks set to be a peaceful one. Peaceful until he runs into Madeleine, as beautiful as she is brusque, a concrete block of tensed muscles and doomsday prophecies.

programme.title: Hotel Barcelona (2)
programme.desc: After returning to her parents’ hotel in Barcelona, Laura spends a romantic night with deputy manager Mateo. Though drawn to him, she must stay professional - especially as her troubled son Pedro drifts further away and family conflicts resurface.

programme.title: Time For Love
programme.desc: Mikolaj jumps on a train smitten by a beautiful woman. But he is without a ticket. With the aid of charming Edyta, he tries to control the chaos on the train and in his life. Will this journey be enough to find love before Christmas?

programme.title: Temporaries
programme.desc: Ariane gets a job as an interpreter at a food plant after moving back to the Richelieu Valley following a breakup. There, she finds herself torn between obeying the harsh demands of her boss and standing up for the exploited migrant workers she befriends.

programme.title: The Cuban
programme.desc: An unexpected friendship begins between an elderly Cuban musician with dementia who is brought out of his shell by his care worker, and a disillusioned young pre-med Afghan student named Mina. Through a shared love of music, both their lives are changed.

programme.title: Amerika Square
programme.desc: In modern-day Athens, a racist local disrupts the escape plans of a Syrian doctor and an African Singer who both want to smuggle out of Greece. As time runs out, tattoo artist Billy steps in to organize their desperate escape.

programme.title: The Beautiful Spark
programme.desc: After losing his job in a scandal, Michelin-starred chef Philippe gets a second chance at La Belle Étincelle - a unique restaurant run by Virginie, and staffed by her autistic son Noé alongside other young people with disabilities.

programme.title: The Kiss
programme.desc: In 1913 Denmark, young officer Anton grapples with duty and love when he befriends Baron von Løvenskjold's daughter, Edith, confined to a wheelchair. As their bond deepens, Anton is ensnared in a web of promises and lies, torn between pity and true love.

programme.title: Particles
programme.desc: As winter sets in and P.A. sees the world shifting around him, he starts to observe strange phenomena in the environment. The changes are imperceptible at first, but gradually his whole world seems to be on the brink.

programme.title: Love At First Fight
programme.desc: Between his friends and the family business, Arnaud's summer looks set to be a peaceful one. Peaceful until he runs into Madeleine, as beautiful as she is brusque, a concrete block of tensed muscles and doomsday prophecies.

programme.title: A Murder Of Crows Hush Little Baby
programme.desc: After a lantern parade, two-year-old Paulina is found missing from her room. The chilling kidnapping hurls Investigator Martin Bruhl back into a sleepless nightmare he experienced two years ago.

programme.title: Hotel Barcelona (2)
programme.desc: After returning to her parents’ hotel in Barcelona, Laura spends a romantic night with deputy manager Mateo. Though drawn to him, she must stay professional - especially as her troubled son Pedro drifts further away and family conflicts resurface.

programme.desc: After returning to her parents’ hotel in Barcelona, Laura spends a romantic night with deputy manager Mateo. Though drawn to him, she must stay professional - especially as her troubled son Pedro drifts further away and family conflicts resurface.

programme.title: Adventures In The Land Of Asha
programme.desc: After 9-year-old Jules is banned from school because of his rare skin disease, his greatest wish is to be cured. He meets a mysterious new friend, Asha, after his dog runs away into the forest. Together, they go on an adventure to find a cure for him.

programme.title: Time For Love
programme.desc: Mikolaj jumps on a train smitten by a beautiful woman. But he is without a ticket. With the aid of charming Edyta, he tries to control the chaos on the train and in his life. Will this journey be enough to find love before Christmas?

programme.title: Sima's Song
programme.desc: In 1970s Afghanistan, best friends Suraya and Sima are torn apart by political upheaval. Suraya is a wealthy communist and Sima is a traditional singer, and though their paths diverge, their enduring bond proves stronger than ideology.

programme.title: Silent Screams
programme.desc: A young doctor is confronted with bad cases of abused children. She is shocked at how complicated it is to hold parents accountable. When a baby is killed, she decides to take a more active role, risking her medical license and her own life.

programme.title: Murders in Amboise
programme.desc: When a violinist is found murdered near da Vinci’s tomb in a pose similar to The Vitruvian Man, Captain Alban Dutertre returns home to investigate. As more da Vinci-inspired killings follow, he and Bérénice Amarillo link this to a missing young artist.

OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.desc: The bitter melon formula supports natural detoxification, helps balance blood sugar, and promotes healthy metabolism. Carefully formulated with selected herbal extracts and GMP-certified, these supplements are ideal for daily wellness and long-term natural health maintenance. programme.title: Jalan Ampas - EP 7
programme.desc: Jalan Ampas is a drama of two parellel storylines - one a period drama and the other an investigative melodrama set in the present.

programme.title: Rahasia Dan Cinta - EP 30
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent entrepreneur finds herself caught in an arranged marriage with Greg - a match orchestrated by their fathers to merge their companies. Aware that Dwita would likely resist this plan, her father assigns her a personal bodyguard, Debu, to keep her in line. As Dwita, Greg and Deby embark on this unexpected journey together, a series of challenges and complications arise, turning Dwita's life upside down.

programme.title: Detik Semasa - EP 1
programme.desc: The impact of the ongoing Middle East conflict ripples far beyond the region. Uncertainty looms over the haj pilgrimage - restrictions that could be imposed as well as safety and security issues. Meanwhile Singaporean students and Singapore owned businesses will need to make important decisions if the situation worsens into a long drawn out war.

programme.title: Kanvas Harapan - EP 4
programme.desc: Ramli Abdullah overcame a troubled childhood marked by drugs and violence to become a respected member of society. He now uses his experiences to inspire and motivate others as a senior operation officer and motivational speaker. Through his NGO, Reforming Support Group, he helps ex-offenders turn their lives around and find redemption. His message is to "Never give up and believe in change", which represents his journey of vindication and hope.

programme.title: Remuk - EP 11
programme.desc: Idris discovers Jamilah is a victim of domestic abuse, while Malik grows distant and lashes out at Ziana over Idris and his condition. programme.title: Papa Ricky - EP 44

programme.desc: Thirunaal Thiruvizha is a festival celebration that blends heartwarming charity with star-studded entertainment! Soulful musical performances set the festive mood and a lively gossip segment dishes out the latest in Tamil cinema and Vasantham programs. Get ready to celebrate our festivals like never before!

programme.title: Binge Café Interviews Season 6 - EP 3
programme.desc: In this 1 hr episode of Binge Cafe, actor Vishnu Vishal joins Anu Hasan for a heartfelt and inspiring conversation! He opens up about his childhood memories, his police officer father, and how his family shaped his journey. Vishnu also talks about his deep passion for cricket , how he dreamed of joining the Indian Cricket Team, the struggles he faced, and how life eventually led him to the cinema industry.

programme.title: Indian Beat S17 - EP 1
programme.desc: Indian Beat is a bilingual magazine programme that showcases activities and events organised by Indian organisations and community groups across Singapore. It highlights community and youth initiatives, celebrates cultural happenings, and brings audiences closer to local stories through engaging coverage across media.

programme.title: Vidumurai Attagasam S2 - EP 6
programme.desc: Vidumurai Attagasam is back for its second season upsized and upgraded with its hilarious game segments. Consisting of various uproarious fun competitive rounds to usher in the holiday special, Vidumurai Attagasam is sure to tickle your bones with the unexpected. programme.title: Kudumbasthan
programme.desc: A lower-middle-class man faces mounting debts and family tensions after losing his job. With a pregnant wife and disapproving in-laws, he must overcome financial struggles and personal conflicts while trying to rebuild his life.
